tmux_fresh_launch.description: Fresh tmux launch — single pane with shell, green status bar

tmux_type_in_shell.description: Tmux pane after running echo hello

tmux_vsplit.description: Vertical split — two panes side by side with border

tmux_vsplit_type_both.description: Vertical split with typed text in both panes

tmux_hsplit.description: Horizontal split — two panes stacked with border

tmux_hsplit_type_both.description: Horizontal split with typed text in both panes

tmux_three_panes.description: Three panes: vsplit then hsplit the right pane

tmux_navigate_left.description: Vsplit then navigate to left pane — border colors change

tmux_navigate_cycle_o.description: Cycle panes with Ctrl-B o twice

tmux_status_bar_renamed.description: Status bar after renaming a window

tmux_command_prompt_typed.description: Command prompt with some text typed

tmux_copy_mode.description: Copy mode indicator on status bar

tmux_vim_launch.description: Vim launched inside a tmux pane (new file)

tmux_vim_with_content.description: Vim with existing file content inside tmux

tmux_vim_insert_and_quit.description: Vim: enter insert, type text, :wq — back to shell prompt

tmux_vim_and_shell_split.description: Vim in left pane, shell in right pane

tmux_exit_one_vsplit_pane.description: Exit right pane in vsplit — left pane fills space

tmux_exit_last_pane_detaches.description: Exit the last pane — tmux session ends, back to outer shell

tmux_vsplit_active_right.description: Vsplit with right pane active — check border colors

tmux_vsplit_active_left.description: Vsplit with left pane active — check border colors

tmux_detach_shell.description: Detach from tmux — back to outer shell

tmux_reattach.description: Detach and reattach — tmux state preserved

tmux_exit_and_relaunch.description: Exit tmux (last pane), then launch tmux again — second session must be fully functional
